workflow.workflowTemplates.officeToMerge.en: Convert Word documents to PDF and merge them

workflow.workflowTemplates.rotateAndNumb.en: Rotate PDF pages and add page numbers

workflow.workflowTemplates.printReady.de.en: Prepare PDF for printing with page numbers and flatten
workflow.workflowTemplates.printReady.de.zh: 添加页码并扁平化以准备打印

workflow.workflowTemplates.grayscaleComp.en: Convert to grayscale and compress for smaller size
workflow.workflowTemplates.grayscaleComp.zh: 转换为灰度并压缩以减小文件大小

workflow.workflowTemplates.extractAndMer.en: Extract specific pages and merge them into a new document
workflow.workflowTemplates.extractAndMer.zh: 提取特定页面并合并为新文档

workflow.workflowTemplates.confidentialD.en: Add confidential watermark and encrypt PDF

workflow.workflowTemplates.pdfToEditable.en: Convert PDF to Word document for editing
workflow.workflowTemplates.pdfToEditable.zh: 将PDF转换为Word文档以便编辑

workflow.workflowTemplates.fullOptimizat.en: Compress, flatten, and linearize for optimal performance
workflow.workflowTemplates.fullOptimizat.zh: 压缩、扁平化并线性化以获得最佳性能

workflow.workflowTemplates.pdfToPresenta.en: Convert PDF to editable PowerPoint presentation
workflow.workflowTemplates.pdfToPresenta.zh: 将PDF转换为可编辑的PowerPoint演示文稿

workflow.workflowTemplates.unlockAndEdit.zh: 解密受保护的PDF以便编辑

workflow.workflowTemplates.ebookConvert..en: Convert EPUB eBooks to PDF format

workflow.workflowTemplates.batchWatermar.en: Add watermark to multiple PDF files at once
workflow.workflowTemplates.batchWatermar.zh: 一次为多个PDF文件添加水印

workflow.workflowTemplates.archivePrep.d.en: Remove metadata, flatten, and compress for long-term storage
workflow.workflowTemplates.archivePrep.d.zh: 删除元数据、扁平化并压缩以便长期存储

workflow.workflowTemplates.reportAssembl.en: Merge documents, add page numbers, header/footer and table of contents
workflow.workflowTemplates.reportAssembl.zh: 合并文档、添加页码、页眉页脚和目录

workflow.workflowTemplates.invoiceProces.en: Extract pages, add watermark, and compress for email
workflow.workflowTemplates.invoiceProces.zh: 提取页面、添加水印并压缩以便邮件发送

workflow.workflowTemplates.photoAlbum.de.en: Convert images to PDF with page numbers
workflow.workflowTemplates.photoAlbum.de.zh: 将图片转换为带页码的PDF

workflow.workflowTemplates.cropAndResize.en: Crop PDF pages and adjust page dimensions
workflow.workflowTemplates.cropAndResize.zh: 裁剪PDF页面并调整页面尺寸

tools.favorite.hint.en: Click the star icon on any tool to save it here for quick access.
tools.favorite.hint.zh: 点击任意工具上的星形图标可将其添加到收藏，方便快速访问。

tools.quality.hint.en: Higher quality produces larger files and takes longer to convert.
tools.quality.hint.zh: 更高的质量会产生更大的文件，转换时间更长。

tools.bookmark.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to edit bookmarks.
tools.bookmark.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放 PDF 文件到此处以编辑书签。

tools.bookmark.noBookmarks.en: No bookmarks yet. Click 'Add Bookmark' to create one.
tools.bookmark.noBookmarks.zh: 暂无书签。点击“添加书签”开始创建。

tools.bookmark.hint.en: Click a bookmark to preview its page. Use +/✎/× to add child, edit, or delete.
tools.bookmark.hint.zh: 点击书签可预览对应页面。使用 +/✎/× 进行添加子节点、编辑或删除。

tools.bookmark.dragHint.en: Drag and drop to reorder bookmarks

tools.bookmark.replaceConfirm.en: This will replace current bookmarks. Continue?
tools.bookmark.replaceConfirm.zh: 这将替换当前书签。是否继续？

tools.bookmark.noBookmarksFound.en: No bookmarks found in this PDF.
tools.bookmark.noBookmarksFound.zh: 该 PDF 中未找到书签。

tools.pageNumbers.customFormatHint.zh: 使用 {page} 和 {total} 作为占位符

tools.watermark.repeatEnable.en: Tile watermark across the entire page

tools.watermark.staggerDescription.en: Offset alternating rows for a more professional look
tools.watermark.staggerDescription.zh: 使相邻行交替错位，效果更专业

tools.formCreator.selectHint.en: Click a field to select, drag to move, use corner to resize
tools.formCreator.selectHint.zh: 点击选择字段，拖动移动，拖动角落调整大小

tools.formCreator.addFieldHint.en: Click on the PDF to add a {type} field

tools.formCreator.noFieldSelected.en: Select a field to edit its properties, or use the toolbar to add new fields.
tools.formCreator.noFieldSelected.zh: 选择一个字段以编辑其属性，或使用工具栏添加新字段。

tools.formCreator.noFieldsYet.en: No fields added yet. Click on the PDF to add form fields.
tools.formCreator.noFieldsYet.zh: 尚未添加字段。点击PDF添加表单字段。
